outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump and Xi begin talks in Beijing with Iran war as defining test
outlets.summary: CNN covers Trump-Xi Day 1 bilateral sessions in Beijing. Iran war ceasefire on 'life support,' Israel-Lebanon talks underway in Washington. Vance says US 'making progress' in Iran negotiations despite Trump's rejection of Tehran's proposal.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump and Xi appear intent on keeping Iran war from overshadowing China summit
outlets.summary: NPR and PBS report both leaders are attempting to balance Iran diplomacy with broader trade and strategic issues. No joint statement expected. China holds leverage as Iran's largest oil buyer.

outlets.name: The Washington Post
outlets.headline: Hezbollah's unjammable fiber-optic drones pose new threat to Israel
outlets.summary: WaPo exclusive details Hezbollah's fiber-optic FPV drones — electronically unjammable, built from commercial parts — posing a persistent threat to IDF in Lebanon despite ceasefire. 41 IDF casualties attributed to these weapons since April 16.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Iran pins blame for oil spill as Pentagon unveils new $29B war cost
outlets.summary: Fox News covers Iran's denial of responsibility for Kharg Island oil spill and Pentagon's updated $29B war cost estimate. Hegseth defends $1.5T defense budget request before Congress.

outlets.name: Wall Street Journal
outlets.headline: DOJ Subpoenas WSJ Over Iran War Leaks
outlets.summary: The Hill reports DOJ subpoenaed Wall Street Journal reporters over leaks related to the Iran war, including their reporting on the Israeli secret base in Iraq. Press freedom advocates alarmed.

outlets.name: Newsmax
outlets.headline: Netanyahu Held Secret Meeting With Emirati President During Iran War
outlets.summary: Newsmax confirms Netanyahu's secret March 26 meeting with UAE President MBZ in Al-Ain. UAE denies the 'secret' framing but does not dispute the meeting occurred. Israel calls it a 'historic breakthrough.'

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Trump faces 'slew of bad options' on Iran as Beijing summit begins
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera analysis: Trump's options on Iran have narrowed. Resuming combat risks escalation; accepting Iran's terms means conceding on nuclear demands; doing nothing allows Iran to approach weapons-grade enrichment. Xi summit seen as last diplomatic option.

outlets.name: CNBC
outlets.headline: Iran war hangs over Trump's China trip — and his presidency
outlets.summary: CNBC analysis: The Iran war is Trump's most consequential foreign policy crisis. How he handles the Beijing summit — particularly getting Xi to pressure Tehran — could define his presidency. Iran's oil exports to China give Beijing outsized leverage.

outlets.name: Arab News
outlets.headline: Lebanon, Israel to hold new talks in Washington May 14-15
outlets.summary: Arab News covers the third round of direct Israel-Lebanon talks in Washington. Agenda includes border delineation, IDF withdrawal timeline, Lebanese sovereignty, and humanitarian corridors. Israeli FM Dermer and Lebanese envoy Karam lead delegations.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Third round of Israel-Lebanon talks begins in Washington amid ongoing Hezbollah fire
outlets.summary: Times of Israel reports third round of direct peace talks between Israel and Lebanon underway in Washington. Background: Hezbollah fiber-optic drone attacks continue in the north. Netanyahu war cabinet meeting to discuss Xi summit developments.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: U.S. Vice President Vance Says Progress Is Being Made in Iran Talks
outlets.summary: Haaretz liveblog tracks Vance's claim of 'progress' in Iran talks, Hezbollah explosive drone attacks on Israel, and analysis of whether Trump-Xi summit will produce concessions on Iran's nuclear program.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Pezeshkian faces hardliner backlash as nuclear talks stall; Iran parliament threatens 90% enrichment
outlets.summary: Iran International reports internal Iranian power struggle: hardliners blocking Pezeshkian from compromising on nuclear deal. Parliament adviser warns 90% uranium enrichment could resume if the US resumes military operations.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran ready to repel new US attack; military at highest readiness level
outlets.summary: PressTV and Iranian state media report Brig-Gen Akrami Nia's declaration that Iranian military is at 'highest level of readiness' with 'no room for retreat.' Iran says it is 'ready to repel' any new US attack as ceasefire remains fragile.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Tehran rejects US terms as hardliners push escalation; BRICS meeting fails to produce joint statement
outlets.summary: Iran International reports hardliners inside Tehran are pushing back against any compromise with the US, even as Araghchi attends BRICS. India's difficulty forging consensus noted given UAE-Iran tensions in the bloc.
